MATTER IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH LOCAL RULE 2.7(B) (COURTESY COPIES). MOTION MAY BE RESET FOR A MON.-THUR. AFTER AUGUST 22. PAPERS SHALL BEAR NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR.; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)
